text.title: Design System Drift Dashboard Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding the design-system-drift-dashboard methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Token source MUST be machine-readable (Style Dictionary / JSON / CSS vars). Spreadsheets forbidden.
rule.rationale: A drift scan over a spreadsheet has no stable diff.

rule.statement: Scan MUST cover every consumer repo, not a sampled subset.
Report MUST track BOTH adoption % AND drift count.
rule.rationale: Adoption alone hides regressions; drift alone hides progress.

rule.statement: A numeric threshold MUST be agreed before publishing.
rule.rationale: Without a number the dashboard becomes anecdotal.

rule.statement: Scan MUST run weekly and persist trend ≥8 weeks.
When preconditions hold, run the full procedure end-to-end and emit the output artefact.
rule.rationale: Routes positive decision-tree leaves to the procedure.

rule.statement: When preconditions fail or skip-conditions hold, exit without producing the artefact and document why.
rule.rationale: Routes negative decision-tree leaves out without polluting the output channel.
